2026-05-12

Chatgpt MacOS App adds slash commands for faster search, o1-preview reasoning, and DALL·E image generation, while expanding support for more coding apps and delivering bug fixes for network use, uploads, and the Companion Window shortcut.

title: OpenAI: Chatgpt MacOS App - November 14 2024

Chatgpt MacOS App adds app-aware responses, a redesigned chat bar, and fixes that cut chat data usage and Office pasting issues.

title: OpenAI: Chatgpt MacOS App - October 30 2024

2026-05-12

Chatgpt MacOS App adds Advanced Voice Mode, supports OpenAI o1-preview and o1-mini, and refines chat with a new text fade animation plus usability, accessibility, and performance improvements.

title: OpenAI: Chatgpt MacOS App - August 6, 2024

2026-05-12

Chatgpt MacOS App adds a companion window for side-by-side access, always-on-top productivity, and quick shortcuts.

title: Anthropic: Claude - Agent view in Claude Code
description:
2026-05-12

Claude adds agent view in Claude Code, a new way to manage multiple sessions from one CLI view. Users can start agents, send them to the background, peek at status and last responses, and jump back into sessions only when input is needed.
guid: Anthropic: Claude - Agent view in Claude Code_2026-05-12

title: Anthropic: Claude Developer Platform - May 11, 2026
description:
2026-05-11

Claude Developer Platform launches Claude Platform on AWS with AWS billing, IAM, and native access to core Claude APIs and tools.

title: Anthropic: Claude Code - 2.1.139
description:
2026-05-11

Claude Code adds agent view, the /goal command, and richer plugin, context, and transcript navigation tools, while expanding MCP and remote control behavior and fixing a broad set of login, prompt, sandbox, and session stability issues.

title: Anthropic: Claude - Introducing the Claude Platform on AWS
description:
2026-05-11

Claude releases the Claude Platform on AWS, bringing the full Claude API feature set to AWS customers with AWS authentication, billing, and commitment retirement. It adds managed agents, code execution, web tools, skills, prompt caching, and new models, all available today.
guid: Anthropic: Claude - Introducing the Claude Platform on AWS_2026-05-11

title: Anthropic: Claude Code - Week 19 · May 4–8, 2026

2026-05-09

Claude Code adds zip and URL plugin loading, cross-project Ctrl+R history search, new worktree branching controls, and hard deny rules for auto mode, while also improving hooks, session handling, and reliability.

description:
2026-05-09

Claude Code ships broad quality-of-life upgrades for Windows and login, plus faster project cleanup and resume-by-PR URL. The release also adds PowerShell support without Git Bash, new CLI and plugin tools, stronger MCP handling, and memory leak fixes.

description:
2026-05-09

Codex releases new plugin sharing and discoverability controls, a simpler remote-control entrypoint, larger-thread paging for app-server clients, and better auth and image resolution across environments. It also ships bug fixes, doc updates, and developer tooling improvements.

description:
2026-05-09

ChatGPT is rolling out Trusted Contact, an optional safety feature for personal accounts that lets users choose someone they trust to be notified in serious suicide-related safety concerns. It is available in supported regions for eligible users and not for Business, Enterprise, or Edu workspaces.

title: OpenAI: ChatGPT Enterprise/EDU - May 7, 2026
description:
2026-05-09

ChatGPT Enterprise/EDU adds workspace agents for eligible Enterprise workspaces with Enterprise Key Management, giving teams a new way to build, share, and run agents for repeatable workflows across ChatGPT, Slack, and connected apps.

title: OpenAI: Codex - Codex for Chrome
description:
2026-05-09

Codex adds a Chrome extension for parallel browser work across tabs while keeping users in control of site access.

title: Anthropic: Claude Code - 2.1.138
description:
2026-05-09

Claude Code fixes internal issues in a maintenance update.

title: Anthropic: Claude Code - 2.1.137
description:
2026-05-09

Claude Code fixes a VS Code extension activation issue on Windows.

title: Anthropic: Claude Code - 2.1.136
description:
2026-05-09

Claude Code adds enterprise feedback survey support, stricter auto mode rules, and a long list of stability fixes across MCP, plugins, login, sessions, terminal rendering, slash commands, and IDE integrations, while polishing dialogs and keyboard behavior.

title: Anthropic: Claude Code - 2.1.133
description:
2026-05-09

Claude Code adds worktree baseRef controls, custom sandbox paths on Linux/WSL, and admin policy merge options, while exposing effort level to hooks. It also improves focus mode and memory usage and fixes several auth, proxy, drive, session, and VS Code issues.

title: Anthropic: Claude - Collaborate with Claude across Excel, PowerPoint, Word and Outlook
description:
2026-05-09

Claude releases Microsoft 365 add-ins for Excel, PowerPoint, and Word in general availability, with Outlook now in public beta for paid plans. It keeps conversation context across apps, syncs edits between open files, and brings inbox triage and draft replies into Outlook.
guid: Anthropic: Claude - Collaborate with Claude across Excel, PowerPoint, Word and Outlook_2026-05-09

title: Microsoft: Agent Framework - dotnet-1.5.0
description:
2026-05-08

Agent Framework ships .NET updates for message filtering, WebBrowsingTool allow listing, workflow and JSON fixes, improved Todo multithreading, AGUI reasoning events, hosted agent observability, and experimental Magentic Orchestration support.

title: Microsoft: Agent Framework - python-1.3.0
description:
2026-05-08

Agent Framework ships a broad 1.3.0 update with new class-based skills, experimental harness context providers, stronger prompt-injection defenses, expanded OpenAI, Anthropic and Foundry support, and improved hosted agent samples and fixes.

title: Google: Gemini API - May 7, 2026
description:
2026-05-08

Gemini API releases Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite GA, optimized for speed, scale and cost efficiency.

title: OpenAI: OpenAI - Advancing voice intelligence with new models in the API
description:
2026-05-07

OpenAI releases new realtime voice models in the API, adding GPT-Realtime-2 for smarter live voice reasoning, GPT-Realtime-Translate for real-time multilingual speech, and GPT-Realtime-Whisper for streaming transcription.
guid: OpenAI: OpenAI - Advancing voice intelligence with new models in the API_2026-05-07

title: OpenAI: ChatGPT Business - May 6, 2026
description:
2026-05-07

ChatGPT Business adds Analytics and Agents in the global admin console, giving admins a unified view of adoption, usage, and workspace agents with trend insights, drilldowns, and agent details for easier oversight and editing.

title: OpenAI: ChatGPT Enterprise/EDU - May 6, 2026
description:
2026-05-07

ChatGPT Enterprise/EDU adds ChatGPT for Intune on the Apple App Store, bringing a separate iOS and iPadOS app for enterprise organizations that use Microsoft Intune and Entra, with app protection and Conditional Access policies for mobile ChatGPT.

title: Anthropic: Claude Code - 2.1.132
description:
2026-05-07

Claude Code adds terminal and session environment variables, improves paste and fullscreen behavior, and ships broad fixes for resume, permissions, scrolling, MCP, login, and model status across terminals and IDEs.

title: Google: Gemini API - May 6, 2026
description:
2026-05-07

Gemini API announces an upcoming Interactions API schema and response_format change, with a new default and legacy removal.

title: Anthropic: Anthropic - Higher usage limits for Claude and a compute deal with SpaceX
description:
2026-05-07

Anthropic expands Claude Code and Claude API usage limits, doubling Pro, Max, Team, and seat-based Enterprise rate limits, removing peak-hour reductions for Pro and Max, and raising Opus API limits as new SpaceX compute capacity boosts availability for heavy users.
guid: Anthropic: Anthropic - Higher usage limits for Claude and a compute deal with SpaceX_2026-05-07

title: Anthropic: Claude Developer Platform - May 6, 2026
description:
2026-05-06

Claude Developer Platform adds public beta support for multiagent sessions and outcomes, plus new webhook support for Claude Managed Agents. It also expands vault credential background refresh and adds more filtering and sorting options for sessions and events.

title: Google: Gemini CLI - Release v0.41.2

2026-05-06

description:
2026-05-06

Claude Code fixes VS Code activation on Windows and Mantle endpoint authentication header issues.

description:
2026-05-06

Claude Code adds plugin URL loading, smarter package-manager auto updates, and new controls for sync output and gateway model discovery, while polishing history, settings, and policy behavior. This release also delivers a broad round of fixes for sessions, editors, cache handling, OAuth, MCP, and VS Code.

title: Anthropic: Claude - New in Claude Managed Agents: dreaming, outcomes, and multiagent orchestration
description:
2026-05-06

Claude launches dreaming for Managed Agents in research preview, adding self-improving memory that reviews past sessions for patterns. It also expands developers’ toolkit with outcomes, multiagent orchestration, webhooks, and public beta access to help agents handle complex tasks with less steering.
guid: Anthropic: Claude - New in Claude Managed Agents: dreaming, outcomes, and multiagent orchestration_2026-05-06

title: OpenAI: OpenAI - New ways to buy ChatGPT ads
description:
2026-05-06

OpenAI expands ChatGPT ads with a beta self-serve Ads Manager, broader partner access, CPC bidding, and new measurement tools. Businesses can now buy, manage, and track campaigns more flexibly while OpenAI keeps ads separate from answers and user conversations private.
guid: OpenAI: OpenAI - New ways to buy ChatGPT ads_2026-05-06

title: OpenAI: OpenAI - GPT‑5.5 Instant: smarter, clearer, and more personalized
description:
2026-05-06

OpenAI releases GPT-5.5 Instant as ChatGPT’s default model, bringing smarter, more accurate, and more concise answers with better personalization from past chats, files, and Gmail. It also adds memory sources for clearer visibility and control over how context shapes responses.
guid: OpenAI: OpenAI - GPT‑5.5 Instant: smarter, clearer, and more personalized_2026-05-06

title: Anthropic: Anthropic - Agents for financial services
description:
2026-05-06

Anthropic adds ready-to-run finance agent templates, Microsoft 365 add-ins for Excel, PowerPoint, Word and Outlook coming soon, plus new partner connectors and a Moody’s MCP app to bring Claude into financial workflows.
guid: Anthropic: Anthropic - Agents for financial services_2026-05-06

title: Microsoft: Agent Framework - dotnet-1.4.0
description:
2026-05-06

Agent Framework ships .NET updates that expand declarative workflows, add HttpRequestAction support, improve HTTP-triggered durable workflow results, and introduce new packages and samples for CodeAct integration and hosting. It also includes breaking script argument support changes and docs refreshes.

title: Microsoft: Microsoft Copilot - May 5, 2026
description:
2026-05-06

Microsoft Copilot adds richer chat, stronger admin controls, and broader extensibility across Microsoft 365. The release brings Bing web answer cards in Copilot Chat, page-summarization nudges in Edge, AI survey insights in Viva Glint, wider report sharing, and easier agent sharing to Teams.

title: Google: Gemini CLI - Release v0.41.1
description:
2026-05-06

Gemini CLI ships a patch release with cherry-picked fixes and version 0.41.1.

title: Google: Gemini CLI - Release v0.41.0
description:
2026-05-06

Gemini CLI ships a broad update with stronger security, smoother startup, and better command handling. It adds experimental Gemma 4 support, manual session UUIDs, improved env loading and workspace trust, plus fixes for crashes, UI errors, and sandbox cleanup.

title: OpenAI: ChatGPT Business - May 5, 2026
description:
2026-05-06

ChatGPT Business now supports ChatGPT for Excel and Google Sheets worldwide, bringing a spreadsheet-native sidebar for building, cleaning up, updating, and explaining workbooks. It also supports Skills and apps where available, with a free preview for Business customers through June 2, 2026.

title: OpenAI: ChatGPT - May 5, 2026
description:
2026-05-06

ChatGPT adds memory improvements for Plus and Pro users, making responses more personalized, continuous, and context-aware by pulling from past chats, saved memories, files, and connected Gmail. It also introduces memory sources across consumer plans so users can see and edit what shaped a response.

title: OpenAI: ChatGPT Enterprise/EDU - May 5, 2026
description:
2026-05-06

ChatGPT Enterprise/EDU adds a spreadsheet-native ChatGPT sidebar for Excel and Google Sheets, now available globally for Enterprise, Edu, and K-12 workspaces to build, update, explain, and review multi-tab spreadsheets with workspace controls and admin enablement.

title: Google: Gemini API - May 5, 2026
description:
2026-05-05

Gemini API adds multimodal File Search with image embedding and richer grounding metadata for visual citations.

title: Amazon: Amazon Quicksight - Amazon Quick generates dashboards from natural language prompts
description:
2026-05-05

Amazon Quicksight now generates dashboards from natural language prompts with Generate Analysis, turning ideas into editable sheets, visuals, filters, and calculated fields. It is generally available in all AWS Regions where Amazon Quick is available.
guid: Amazon: Amazon Quicksight - Amazon Quick generates dashboards from natural language prompts_2026-05-05

title: Anthropic: Claude Code - 2.1.128
description:
2026-05-05

Claude Code adds broader plugin support, smarter MCP and model handling, and a wave of reliability fixes across terminal, worktree, and sub-agent workflows. It also improves prompts, restores missing links and images, and tightens behavior for sessions, plugins, and console auth.

title: Anthropic: Claude - Claude Security is now in public beta
description:
2026-05-05

Claude releases Claude Security in public beta for Claude Enterprise customers, bringing code vulnerability scanning and proposed fixes with Opus 4.7. The update also adds scheduled scans, targeted scans, better triage tracking, and easier exports and workflow integrations.
guid: Anthropic: Claude - Claude Security is now in public beta_2026-05-05

title: Anthropic: Claude - New connectors in Claude for everyday life
description:
2026-05-05

Claude expands connectors beyond work tools, now supporting apps like AllTrails, Instacart, Audible, Tripadvisor, Uber, Spotify and more. It also improves how connectors surface in chats, suggesting the right app in context and letting users stay in the conversation while they search, plan, and act.
guid: Anthropic: Claude - New connectors in Claude for everyday life_2026-05-05

title: Anthropic: Claude - Built-in memory for Claude Managed Agents
description:
2026-05-05

Claude adds Memory for Managed Agents in public beta, giving agents cross-session learning with filesystem-based memories, API control, audit logs, and portable stores for enterprise teams building long-running agents.
guid: Anthropic: Claude - Built-in memory for Claude Managed Agents_2026-05-05

title: Anthropic: Claude - Redesigning Claude Code on desktop for parallel agents
description:
2026-05-05

Claude releases a redesigned Claude Code desktop app for running more tasks in parallel, with a new session sidebar, drag-and-drop workspace, integrated terminal and file editor, faster diffs, expanded previews, SSH support on Mac, and performance and reliability improvements.
guid: Anthropic: Claude - Redesigning Claude Code on desktop for parallel agents_2026-05-05

title: Anthropic: Claude - Introducing routines in Claude Code
description:
2026-05-05

Claude introduces routines in Claude Code, a research preview that lets developers automate tasks on a schedule, by API call, or from GitHub events. Routines run on Claude Code’s web infrastructure and are available now for Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise users.
guid: Anthropic: Claude - Introducing routines in Claude Code_2026-05-05

title: Anthropic: Claude - The advisor strategy: Give agents an intelligence boost
description:
2026-05-05

Claude introduces the advisor tool in beta, letting Sonnet or Haiku act as an executor while Opus provides guidance on demand. The result is near Opus-level agent intelligence at lower cost, with built-in spend controls and support for existing tools in a single Messages API request.
guid: Anthropic: Claude - The advisor strategy: Give agents an intelligence boost_2026-05-05

title: Anthropic: Claude - Making Claude Cowork ready for enterprise
description:
2026-05-05

Claude releases Claude Cowork generally available on all paid plans and adds organization controls for company-wide deployment, including role-based access, group spend limits, richer analytics, expanded OpenTelemetry, and Zoom connector support for team workflows.
guid: Anthropic: Claude - Making Claude Cowork ready for enterprise_2026-05-05

title: Anthropic: Claude - Claude Managed Agents: get to production 10x faster
description:
2026-05-05

Claude launches Managed Agents, a public beta suite of composable APIs for building and deploying cloud-hosted agents at scale. It brings secure sandboxing, long-running sessions, scoped permissions, tracing, and faster production-ready agent development on the Claude Platform.
guid: Anthropic: Claude - Claude Managed Agents: get to production 10x faster_2026-05-05

title: Anthropic: Claude - Audit Claude Platform activity with the Compliance API
description:
2026-05-05

Claude adds the Compliance API on the Claude Platform, giving admins programmatic access to organization-wide audit logs. Security and compliance teams can track user activity, monitor configuration changes, and connect Claude usage data to existing compliance systems.
guid: Anthropic: Claude - Audit Claude Platform activity with the Compliance API_2026-05-05

title: Anthropic: Claude - Auto mode for Claude Code
description:
2026-05-05

Claude adds auto mode for Claude Code, a safer long-running permissions option that lets Claude make decisions with safeguards and fewer interruptions. It’s in research preview for Team users now, with Enterprise and API rollout coming soon, and works with Sonnet 4.6 and Opus 4.6.
guid: Anthropic: Claude - Auto mode for Claude Code_2026-05-05

title: Anthropic: Claude - Put Claude to work on your computer
description:
2026-05-05

Claude adds computer use in Claude Cowork and Claude Code, letting it point, click, browse, open files, and run dev tools on your computer in research preview. It also expands Dispatch, so subscribers can hand off tasks from phone or desktop with built-in safety controls.
guid: Anthropic: Claude - Put Claude to work on your computer_2026-05-05

title: Anthropic: Claude - 1M context is now generally available for Opus 4.6 and Sonnet 4.6
description:
2026-05-05

Claude adds full 1M context access for Opus 4.6 and Sonnet 4.6 at standard pricing, with no long-context premium and higher rate limits across the window. It also expands media support to 600 images or PDF pages and rolls out automatic 1M context in Claude Code for eligible users.
guid: Anthropic: Claude - 1M context is now generally available for Opus 4.6 and Sonnet 4.6_2026-05-05

title: Anthropic: Claude - Claude now creates interactive charts, diagrams and visualizations
description:
2026-05-05

Claude adds beta inline visuals in chat, bringing real-time charts, diagrams, and interactive visualizations that can change as conversations evolve. The feature is on by default and available on all plan types, including Claude Cowork on paid plans.
guid: Anthropic: Claude - Claude now creates interactive charts, diagrams and visualizations_2026-05-05

title: Anthropic: Claude - Bringing Code Review to Claude Code
description:
2026-05-05

Claude launches Code Review, a research preview for Team and Enterprise that sends multi-agent reviews on every PR to catch bugs, rank severity, and surface high-signal comments. It adds deeper review coverage with spend controls and analytics.
guid: Anthropic: Claude - Bringing Code Review to Claude Code_2026-05-05

title: Anthropic: Claude - Improving skill-creator: Test, measure, and refine Agent Skills
description:
2026-05-05

Claude adds skill-creator enhancements for writing evals, running benchmarks, and improving skill reliability as models evolve. The update brings parallel multi-agent testing, A/B comparison agents, and better skill trigger tuning across Claude.ai, Cowork, Claude Code, and the repo.
guid: Anthropic: Claude - Improving skill-creator: Test, measure, and refine Agent Skills_2026-05-05

Claude Code adds computer use in the CLI, interactive in-product lessons, flicker-free rendering, per-tool MCP result-size overrides, and plugin executables on PATH. It also ships permission and hook updates, better file editing, quieter thinking summaries, and broader voice and deep-link support.

description:

Claude Code adds ultrareview, session recaps, custom themes, and a redesigned web experience with a new sessions sidebar.

description:

Claude Code adds Opus 4.7 defaulting, xhigh effort, cloud routines, parallel code review, usage tracking, and native CLI binaries.

title: Anthropic: Claude Code - Week 15
description:

Claude Code adds Ultraplan early preview, live Monitor log streaming, self-paced /loop, /team-onboarding, and /autofix-pr.

Claude Code adds computer use in CLI research preview, plus interactive lessons, smoother rendering, bigger MCP results, and Bash PATH plugins.

description:
2026-05-02

Claude Code adds Auto mode in research preview with smarter permission prompts and new weekly tools for Desktop, Web, Windows, and hooks.

title: OpenAI: OpenAI - Introducing Advanced Account Security
description:
2026-05-02

OpenAI introduces Advanced Account Security for ChatGPT, adding stronger phishing-resistant sign-in, tighter recovery controls, shorter sessions, login alerts, and automatic training exclusion. The new opt-in protection also extends to Codex and includes preferred Yubico security key bundles.
guid: OpenAI: OpenAI - Introducing Advanced Account Security_2026-05-02

title: Amazon: Amazon Quicksight - AWS Transform now offers BI migration agents for Power BI and Tableau to Amazon Quick
description:
2026-05-01

Amazon Quicksight adds BI migration agents in AWS Transform to convert Tableau and Power BI dashboards into Quicksight assets, helping reduce migration effort from months to days. The agents assess readiness, rebuild dashboard elements, and run entirely within your AWS account.
guid: Amazon: Amazon Quicksight - AWS Transform now offers BI migration agents for Power BI and Tableau to Amazon Quick_2026-05-01

Claude Code releases a broad update with smarter model picking, project purge tools, stronger permission handling, improved OAuth login, Windows and PowerShell fixes, better telemetry, and a long list of stability, UI, and security improvements across sessions, retries, and terminal behavior.

title: Amazon: Amazon Quicksight - Amazon Quick Adds Custom Sort for Filter Controls

2026-05-01

Amazon Quicksight adds custom sort for filter controls, giving authors control over dropdown and list value order. They can now sort by business logic, related metrics, or manual order so the most relevant options appear first across supported regions.

title: Anthropic: Claude Developer Platform - April 30, 2026

Claude Developer Platform retires the 1M token context beta for Sonnet 4.5 and 4, guiding users to 4.6 models for general availability.

2026-05-01

Codex ships a broad release with persisted /goal workflows, richer TUI controls, stronger permission profiles, improved plugin and external agent workflows, and clearer MultiAgentV2 configuration. It also brings many reliability fixes across resume, terminal, network, Windows, and Bedrock support.

2026-05-01

ChatGPT rolls out Advanced Account Security for personal accounts, adding stronger sign-in options, stricter recovery, login notifications, and session controls to help protect against unauthorized access and account takeover.

description:
2026-05-01

ChatGPT Enterprise/EDU improves admin-managed SharePoint sync by moving app scope requests to Microsoft application scopes, helping sync selected content and evaluate SharePoint permissions more reliably. Admins and owners can also configure Microsoft Purview sensitivity labels from app settings.

Gemini CLI adds offline support with bundled ripgrep binaries, stronger core reliability, and new workflow improvements like MCP resource tools, skill extraction updates, and better theme and sandbox behavior.

2026-04-29

Amazon Web Services expands its AI lineup with Amazon Quick updates, new Amazon Connect agentic AI solutions, and a broader partnership with OpenAI. Quick adds a desktop app preview, new Free and Plus plans, visual asset generation, and more app integrations, while Bedrock gains new OpenAI model and agent previews.

2026-04-29

description:
2026-04-29

Amazon Quicksight adds document and visual creation in chat, letting users draft polished documents, presentations, spreadsheets, images, charts, and infographics with natural language and export them to common file formats. Visual creation is in preview, while document creation is broadly available.

description:
2026-04-28

Claude Code ships a broad update with new ultrareview automation, PowerShell fallback on Windows, smarter skills and plugin validation, plus faster startup and cleaner auto mode messaging. It also fixes several CLI, terminal, VSCode, and Bash tool bugs for smoother sessions.

title: OpenAI: OpenAI - OpenAI models, Codex, and Managed Agents come to AWS
description:
2026-04-28

OpenAI launches GPT-5.5 and other frontier models on Amazon Bedrock, brings Codex to AWS, and adds Bedrock Managed Agents powered by OpenAI, giving enterprises new ways to build and deploy AI in trusted AWS environments with security, governance, and workflows they already use.

title: Anthropic: Anthropic - Claude for Creative Work
description:
2026-04-28

guid: Anthropic: Anthropic - Claude for Creative Work_2026-04-28

description:
2026-04-28

Amazon Quicksight adds Visier’s Vee AI assistant through MCP, bringing governed workforce intelligence into the Quick workspace. Users can ask natural-language questions, run recurring workforce reviews with Quick Flows, and combine Visier answers with enterprise knowledge in Quick Spaces.

description:
2026-04-28

description:
2026-04-28
